data.content:
Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: drop
Rationale: Every implementation violation listed under 'What's wrong' has been remediated: `normalizeOpenCodeModel` exists and is wired into `normalizeAgentIdentity` with explicit logic to prevent the binary-version leak; `to-active-agent-info.ts` was deleted; `terminal-store.ts` was refactored to store only `knotsLeaseId` with an explanatory docblock; `use-agent-info-map.ts` no longer re-normalizes; `beat-table-metadata.tsx` uses single canonical keys per field; `buildAgentLabel` is gone. The test files for AC-1 (`agent-identity-opencode.test.ts`) and AC-9 (`knots-lease-roundtrip.test.ts`) exist, and `docs/knots-agent-identity-contract.md` exists for AC-8. The beat is stranded in `ready_for_planning` because it was never advanced as the fixes landed across prior commits. There is no remaining implementation work to start.
Agent: claude-claude-sonnet-4-6
Job: stale-grooming-6
Repo: /home/cartine/foolery
Action: marked abandoned.
